problem id: 835c56b6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) AND NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  01110111 -> 00111011
  11100101 -> 00101111
  00110000 -> 10000001
  00111010 -> 11010001
  00010000 -> 10000000
  01111010 -> 11010011
  01110001 -> 00001011
  01010011 -> 00011010
  00000110 -> 00110000
  11111111 -> 01111111

query: 10001110
predicted answer: 01110100
